title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 11 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 11 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 11 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 11/03/2024
DCE iron ore futures market falling sharply trends by 5.41%. the main contract I2405 closed 831.Some traders adopt separate quotations; Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high. total transactions is poor PBF at Shandong port dealt 835 yuan/mt; decreased 40-43 yuan/mt from last Friday.
